name: signal-q
description: Signal Q - Autonomous Transcendence Agent API

scripts.validate: npm run secret-scan && npm audit && npm run validate:openapi && npm run validate:domains
scripts.build: echo 'Validation build - checking worker syntax and OpenAPI spec' && cd worker && node -c src/index.js && echo '✅ Worker syntax is valid' && cd .. && npm run validate:openapi && npm run validate:openapi:yaml && echo '✅ OpenAPI specifications are valid'

author: quilross
